violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
The floor in the kitchen (grout) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (low grout). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2026

The storage area behind the hot water heater has an accumulation of soil residue and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The ceiling in the cafeteria area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both milk cases. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024

The one door refrigerator located behind the serving line in the kitchen area was not operational. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The high temp mechanical dishwasher located in the kitchen area was not operational. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The floor in the kitchen area was observed with areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment larger stand mixer and commercial coffee maker in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024

The wall behind the dishwasher is in poor repair. Walls that are subject to splash and spillage must be smooth durable and easily cleanable. Corrective action - establishment is to repair the wall behind the dishwasher. The wall behind the dishwasher must be constructed with material the is durable and easily cleanable such as FRP. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen (industrial mixer, toaster, industrial coffee machine). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2024
The floor by the drain has areas of low grout . The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area (large mixer, toaster and coffee machine). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The walls in the dish ware washing area, behind prep table across from ovens and half wall on service line are constructed of painted concrete. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at the Dairy chest cooler 2 observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Ice buildup observed in the Dairy chest cooler 1. Ice buildup shall be broken down and removed from unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023

Milk was held at 53-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023
One oven was not in good repair, not functional at time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The floor in the walk in freezer have an accumulation of food residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (a large commercial maker) or items were observed next to the hand sink in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
Ceiling tiles in the dry storage room are stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
